description: Live reality deviates from the Golden Data Set — e.g. spindle runs 2.3 sigma under Golden (§17.1). Detected at the edge against the Edge-Golden-Snapshot of the active SetupMode. Inherits the full lifecycle from Discrepancy.

attributes.name: observed_value
attributes.description: Observed value in the drift window

attributes.name: expected_value
attributes.description: Golden posterior mean for the active SetupMode

attributes.name: sigma_shift
attributes.description: Shift in sigma units vs the Golden posterior — drives the adaptive mode-switch (§16)

relationships.description: Golden posterior the drift was measured against
Active SetupMode at the time of the drift
